scope: Full legacy-parity migration: the 3 legacy read streams (forms, form_items, responses). Legacy is read-only (no reverse-ETL write path); the full Forms API surface (forms.create, batchUpdate, watches) is excluded with concrete reasons below.

excluded.reason: The responses stream already lists every response; /forms/{formId}/responses/{responseId} is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
form creation requires a broader write scope than a read-only source connector needs
/forms/{formId}:batchUpdate is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/forms/{formId}/watches is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation

/forms/{formId}/watches is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
watch deletion is a destructive admin action, not a syncable read/write record
